actions.text: Amendment SA 5452 ruled out of order by the chair.

Motion to waive all applicable budgetary discipline with respect to amendment SA 5452, not having achieved 60 votes in the affirmative, rejected in Senate by Yea-Nay Vote. 15 - 84. Record Vote Number: 138.
Point of order that the amendment violates section 305(f) of the CBA raised in Senate with respect to amendment SA 5452.
Amendment SA 5452 proposed by Senator Tillis. To reallocate funds that would have been used for the Anti-Weaponization Fund to fraud enforcement.

purpose: To reallocate funds that would have been used for the Anti-Weaponization Fund to fraud enforcement.
